description: Capabilities under review for AutoMindLab enterprise adoption. Unlisted capabilities are not approved by default.

entries.name: NemoClaw runtime observability patterns
entries.rollbackNotes: Keep this capability in candidate status until a typed contract and a live validation harness exist.
entries.reviewNotes: Candidate only. The repo may adopt observability ideas if they strengthen enterprise diagnostics without importing consumer UX or workstation assumptions.
entries.enterpriseJustification: Potentially improves host and worker visibility for future NemoClaw deployments.
entries.boundaryDecision: Translate only into reusable runtime contracts, validators, or runbooks. Do not import product UI or local operator shell behavior.

entries.name: AgentMail inbound webhook processor
entries.rollbackNotes: Keep webhook delivery in planned status until a typed inbound processor and host-reviewed escalation path exist.
entries.reviewNotes: Candidate only. The manifest may describe planned webhooks, but the runtime does not yet expose a production inbound processor.
entries.enterpriseJustification: Could eventually enable inbound email-driven enterprise workflows once host ownership, schemas, and escalation are fully implemented.
entries.boundaryDecision: Do not configure inbound webhooks in production until a typed runtime service owns them and operators can review inbound actions.
